name_cn:
NANO NOÉ Handbag #️⃣M81266
Exclusive global launch of authentic counter-style goods! This item is custom-made according to counter production processes, with dynamic chip serial numbers. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version if needed!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
13 x 16 x 10 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Drawstring closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 45.5 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 54.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
Made in France
